name: DayZ
description: DayZ dedicated server template using a direct SteamCMD install. It requires a real Steam account for app 223350 and starts the native Linux DayZServer binary without LinuxGSM cron/config side effects.

install.script:
#!/bin/bash
set -Eeuo pipefail
app_id="${APP_ID:-223350}"
if [ -z "${STEAM_USER:-}" ] || [ "${STEAM_USER}" = "anonymous" ]; then
  echo "DayZ app ${app_id} requires STEAM_USER and STEAM_PASS from a real Steam account."
  exit 20
fi
if [ -z "${STEAM_PASS:-}" ]; then
  echo "STEAM_PASS is required for DayZ SteamCMD install."
  exit 20
fi
mkdir -p /mnt/server/steamcmd /mnt/server/steamapps /mnt/server/profiles /mnt/server/.steam/sdk64 /mnt/server/.steam/sdk32
install_steamcmd() {
  rm -f /tmp/steamcmd.tar.gz
  curl --retry 5 --retry-delay 2 --connect-timeout 20 -fsSL -o /tmp/steamcmd.tar.gz https://steamcdn-a.akamaihd.net/client/installer/steamcmd_linux.tar.gz
  tar -xzf /tmp/steamcmd.tar.gz -C /mnt/server/steamcmd
}
if [ ! -x /mnt/server/steamcmd/steamcmd.sh ] || [ ! -x /mnt/server/steamcmd/linux32/steamcmd ]; then
  rm -rf /mnt/server/steamcmd
  mkdir -p /mnt/server/steamcmd
  install_steamcmd
fi
login_args=(+login "$STEAM_USER" "$STEAM_PASS")
[ -z "${STEAM_AUTH:-}" ] || login_args+=("$STEAM_AUTH")
for attempt in 1 2 3 4; do
  if HOME=/mnt/server /mnt/server/steamcmd/steamcmd.sh +force_install_dir /mnt/server "${login_args[@]}" +app_update "$app_id" validate +quit; then
    break
  fi
  status=$?
  if [ "$attempt" -eq 4 ]; then
    exit "$status"
  fi
  rm -rf /mnt/server/steamcmd/package /mnt/server/steamcmd/linux32/steamcmd
  install_steamcmd
  sleep $((attempt * 15))
done
if [ ! -x /mnt/server/DayZServer ]; then
  echo "DayZServer executable is missing after SteamCMD install. Check Steam credentials, Steam Guard and app ${app_id} access."
  exit 30
fi
cp -f /mnt/server/steamcmd/linux64/steamclient.so /mnt/server/.steam/sdk64/steamclient.so || true
cp -f /mnt/server/steamcmd/linux32/steamclient.so /mnt/server/.steam/sdk32/steamclient.so || true
server_name="${SERVER_NAME:-ADPanel DayZ Server}"
server_password="${SERVER_PASSWORD:-}"
admin_password="${ADMIN_PASSWORD:-change-me}"
max_players="${MAX_PLAYERS:-60}"
query_port="${QUERY_PORT:-27016}"
server_name="${server_name//\"/}"
server_password="${server_password//\"/}"
admin_password="${admin_password//\"/}"
if [ ! -f /mnt/server/serverDZ.cfg ]; then
cat > /mnt/server/serverDZ.cfg <<EOF
hostname = "$server_name";
password = "$server_password";
passwordAdmin = "$admin_password";
maxPlayers = $max_players;
verifySignatures = 2;
forceSameBuild = 1;
steamQueryPort = $query_port;
EOF
fi
chmod -R a+rwX /mnt/server
